## Outcome

What verifiable user or engineering outcome does this change deliver?

## Scope and evidence

- TODO/decision IDs:
- Tests and exact commands:
- Live/external/lab prerequisites exercised or explicitly not exercised:

## Boundary review

- [ ] Correct architectural owner; no duplicated source of truth
- [ ] Compatibility/migration impact documented and tested
- [ ] Security, privacy, license, provenance, and hardware implications reviewed
- [ ] Living docs and changelog updated
- [ ] `git diff --check` and required local gates pass
